title: Property Consultant - Salarpuria Sattva - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Salarpuria Sattva - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Salarpuria Sattva has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salarpuria Sattva:
Salarpuria Sattva is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva!
